name: crm_full
prompt: Build a CRM with login, contacts list, deals pipeline, dashboard with analytics, role-based access for admin/sales/viewer, and Stripe payment for premium plan.

name: ecommerce
prompt: E-commerce platform with product catalog, shopping cart, checkout with Stripe, order tracking, admin panel, and customer accounts.

name: project_management
prompt: Project management tool like Jira. Users can create projects, add tasks, assign to team members, track progress with kanban board, and comment on tasks.

name: saas_analytics
prompt: SaaS analytics dashboard where companies can track user events, view funnels, create custom reports, manage team access, and export data as CSV.

name: job_board
prompt: Job board with employer and candidate accounts. Employers post jobs, candidates apply, employers can shortlist and message candidates. Premium listings for employers.

name: lms
prompt: Learning management system. Instructors create courses with video lessons and quizzes. Students enroll, track progress, earn certificates. Admin manages platform.

name: healthcare
prompt: Doctor appointment booking system. Patients register, search doctors by specialty, book appointments, get reminders. Doctors manage schedules. Admin manages system.

name: inventory
prompt: Inventory management system for warehouses. Track stock levels, add/remove items, set reorder alerts, generate reports, and manage multiple warehouse locations.

name: social_platform
prompt: Social platform where users create profiles, post updates, follow others, like and comment, send direct messages, and see a personalized feed.

name: event_management
prompt: Event management platform. Organizers create events, sell tickets via Stripe, check in attendees. Attendees browse events, buy tickets, see their history.
